A26: VIII | B26: ─Éß╗ïnh gi├í
A27: 1 | B27: Tß╗ë lß╗ç ph╞░╞íng ph├íp FCFF | E27: 1 | G27: C├┤ng ty kh├┤ng vay nß╗ú
A28: 2 | B28: Tß╗æc ─æß╗Ö t─âng tr╞░ß╗ƒng d├ái hß║ín | E28: 0.025 | G28: B├ío c├ío ng├ánh D╞░ß╗úc
A29: IX | B29: Kh├íc
B30: Thuß║┐ suß║Ñt | D30: 0.18694946771385557 | E30: 0.18694946771385557 | F30: Bß║▒ng n─âm ngo├íi (2019) | G30: Kh├┤ng c├│ thay ─æß╗òi so vß╗¢i n─âm tr╞░ß╗¢c
B31: Lß╗úi ├¡ch cß╗ºa cß╗ò ─æ├┤ng thiß╗âu sß╗æ/LNST | D31: 0 | E31: 0 | F31: Bß║▒ng n─âm ngo├íi (2019) | G31: Kh├┤ng c├│ thay ─æß╗òi so vß╗¢i n─âm tr╞░ß╗¢c
